label: UI / Frontend
testSteps: Open the affected screens and confirm they render correctly
Check the layout on both desktop and mobile widths
Verify buttons, forms, and links behave as expected

label: Backend / API
testSteps: Call the affected endpoints with valid input and confirm correct responses
Send invalid or missing input and confirm errors are handled
Check status codes and response shape
expected: Endpoints return correct data and status codes

label: Authentication
testSteps: Verify login works with valid credentials
Verify login fails with invalid credentials
Verify logout clears the session
Verify session timeout behaves correctly
expected: Users can log in and out

label: Payments / Billing
testSteps: Run a test transaction end to end
Verify totals, taxes, and currency are correct
Verify declined or failed payments are handled

label: Database
testSteps: Apply the migration on a copy of the data and confirm it runs cleanly
Verify reads and writes still work after the change
Confirm the migration can roll back if supported

label: Deployment / Infra
testSteps: Deploy to a staging environment
Run a smoke test: the app boots and core pages load
Check the logs for startup errors

label: Test suite
testSteps: Run the related test suite and confirm it passes
Confirm new tests actually cover the change
regression: The full test suite still passes
